first_invoice.title: First Invoice
first_invoice.description: First invoice record in the period.

last_invoice.title: Last Invoice
last_invoice.description: Last invoice record in the period.

registration_count.title: Registration Count
registration_count.description: Number of registration records in the period.

tax_total.title: Tax Total
tax_total.description: Sum of taxes in the period (Decimal 12,2).

amount_total.title: Amount Total
amount_total.description: Sum of total amounts in the period (Decimal 12,2).

cancellation_count.title: Cancellation Count
cancellation_count.description: Number of cancellation records in the period.

EventSummary.description: EventSummary provides a summary of events and invoices over a period.

type.title: Event Type
type.description: Event type code from L2E list.

EventTypeCount.description: EventTypeCount pairs an event type code with its occurrence count.

issuer_tax_code.title: Issuer Tax Code
issuer_tax_code.description: Tax identification number of the invoice issuer.

InvoiceRecord.description: InvoiceRecord identifies a specific invoice in an export or summary.
